ausar thompson.detail: Played 29 minutes in Game 7 loss; 5 pts, 7 reb, 2 blk in blowout

cade cunningham.detail: Played 37 minutes in Game 7 loss; went 5-16 FG including 0-7 from three in blowout loss
cade cunningham.web_narrative: Cunningham finished with 13 points on 5-of-16 shooting, going 0-for-7 from three-point range in a 31-point blowout loss. Cold shooting, particularly from deep, explains the miss on the points over 15 prop.

donovan mitchell.detail: Played 31 minutes in Game 7 win; 26 pts, 8 ast, 6 reb in blowout victory

evan mobley.detail: Played 36 minutes in Game 7 win; 21 pts, 12 reb, 6 ast in dominant blowout

james harden.detail: Played 36 minutes in Game 7 win; no external sources available

jarrett allen.detail: Played 25 minutes in Game 7 blowout win; 23 pts, 7 reb on efficient shooting

tobias harris.detail: Played only 23 minutes; carried a left ankle sprain sustained in Game 5 into Game 7
tobias harris.web_narrative: Harris played just 23 minutes in a 31-point blowout loss, going 0-for-6 from the field for 5 points. He had suffered a left ankle sprain in Game 5 of the prior series, which likely limited his effectiveness and playing time, contributing to the miss on the points over 10 prop.
